---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## The pain

<!-- What's frustrating about your current workflow? What forces you to switch tools? -->

## What would solve it

<!-- Describe the feature. A sentence or two is fine. Mocks/sketches welcome. -->

## How would it fit WDR's design principles

<!-- WDR is offline, no data collection, minimal permissions. Does this feature need
     new permissions or network access? Be honest — features that break the privacy
     guarantee are unlikely to ship. -->

## Roadmap awareness

- [ ] I checked [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) and this isn't already proposed
- [ ] If it is, my issue adds new context (use case, mock, etc.)
